_comment: CE-5 crew combat interjections. Each entry binds (crew_id, trigger) to a bank of interchangeable lines voiced per character_voices.md. The combat view picks one event per round (priority + throttle) and surfaces it as a log line + floating subtitle.

lines: Captain. Hostile signature confirmed. I have a vector.
Engagement window opens. Standard rules of evasion apply, sir. Sorry. Captain.
Hull integrity at thirty. Captain, I would recommend a course correction or a miracle.
We are not on course for surviving this. Adjust.
Their hull is failing. Press the advantage.
Final approach. They cannot weather another pass.
Guild revenue cutter. I know that hull. I know the man flying it.
Guild markings. Of course. Some things never let you go.
Engagement closed. Adding 'survived' to the after-action report.
Captain. We did what we could. I am sorry.
They want a fight. Give them one.
Enemy on scope. Steady hands.
Hull's screaming. You hear it?
We are not in good shape. Decide quick.
He's leaking. Finish him.
Their hull's done. One more pass.
Union pickets. They know me. That's worse.
Union hull. I've welded those plates. I know where they're thin.
Done. Patch list comes after.
I'm sorry, Captain. We'll fix what's left.
Hostile contact. Engagement parameters are within tolerance.
I am tracking shield harmonics. The data will be useful regardless of outcome.
Hull integrity has fallen below acceptable thresholds. I would prefer we did not test the failure point.
Captain. My estimate of our survival probability has dropped substantially. Please adjust.
Their hull is approaching catastrophic failure. The next strike is likely terminal.
Statistically, one more well-placed hit ends this.
A Collective surveyor. I helped certify that frame. I am not. I am not pleased to see it here.
Collective markings. The situation is more interesting than I would prefer.
Engagement concluded. I will compile the data when my hands stop shaking.
Captain. I do not have words for this. I am sorry.
Way I see it, this is just business. They came for a fight and we are the fight.
Captain. Smile. They cannot tell when you are scared.
Captain. We are bleeding bad. Time to be smart instead of brave.
This is a bad trade, Captain. Fold or raise. Either is better than this.
He is on the ropes. Way I see it, that is when most folk get desperate. Watch him.
Done deal. Close it before he closes it for us.
Frontier colors. I know that paint job. He will not run, Captain. He cannot.
Alliance interceptor. Fellow I used to drink with flies that hull. Or used to.
Way I see it, that was a good day's work. Drinks on me when we dock.
Captain. I am sorry. I really am.
